privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: LeadForge CRM (“we”, “us”) processes personal data to provide the Service. This policy describes what we collect, why, and your choices.
privacy.p2: We collect account data (name, email), usage data, and content you store in workspaces. Processing is based on contract performance, legitimate interest, and consent where required.
privacy.p3: We use subprocessors including hosting and email providers. Data may be transferred internationally with appropriate safeguards.
privacy.p4: You may access, correct, export, or delete your data where applicable by contacting support or using in-product controls.
privacy.p5: We retain data while your account is active and as needed for legal obligations. Security measures include encryption in transit and strict tenant isolation.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.p1: By using LeadForge you agree to these terms. You must be authorized to bind your organization.
terms.p2: The Service is provided as described in your plan. You are responsible for user activity under your account and for compliance with applicable laws.
terms.p3: Fees are billed according to your subscription. We may suspend access for non-payment or material breach.
terms.p4: The Service is provided “as is” to the extent permitted by law. Liability is limited as set forth in your order form or applicable law.
terms.p5: Either party may terminate. Upon termination, your access ends and data handling follows our privacy policy.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: How we protect your CRM data
security.p1: Multi-tenant isolation is enforced at the database with row-level security and organization-scoped application logic.
security.p2: Authentication uses industry-standard flows. Passwords are never stored in plaintext. Sessions use secure cookies.
security.p3: Billing data is processed by PCI-compliant providers. We do not store full card numbers on our servers.
security.p4: We log critical actions for auditability. Access to production systems is restricted and monitored.
